description_long: This object is a sleek, angular airplane with a highly faceted, stealth-inspired design, reminiscent of modern stealth fighter jets like the F-117 Nighthawk. The body is predominantly composed of sharp, flat surfaces and aggressive, swept-back wings that give it a futuristic and menacing appearance. The wings are mid-mounted and sharply swept, with multiple jagged extensions and no visible winglets. The tail section features a distinctive twin vertical stabilizer configuration, angled outward, and the nose is sharply pointed, contributing to its aerodynamic profile. The cockpit area is subtly integrated into the fuselage, with a dark, faceted canopy that blends seamlessly into the body. No visible landing gear or engine intakes are apparent, suggesting a design focused on stealth and minimal external features.
description: A black, angular stealth airplane with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a faceted, integrated cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply pointed nose, wide angular wings, and twin vertical stabilizers flanking the rear.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the jagged, swept-back wings and the elongated, faceted fuselage with a low profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin outward-angled vertical stabilizers and the broad, angular wing structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, emphasizing the layered, angular wing surfaces and streamlined body.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept wings with multiple jagged extensions and no visible winglets; angular, faceted surfaces dominate the design.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines or intakes; engine type not apparent from exterior.
attribute_tail_design: Twin outward-angled vertical stabilizers in a V-tail-like configuration; no horizontal stabilizer visible.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; configuration not apparent.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the fuselage with a faceted canopy; appears single-seat.
